subject: Cloud Computing
title: Azure's Hybrid Cloud Approach
description: A 60-second lesson on Azure's Hybrid Cloud Approach.

hook.text: Many enterprises can't put everything in the public cloud. Regulations, latency, or legacy systems prevent it.

buildup.text: Azure Arc lets companies manage on-premises servers and other clouds using Azure's tools.

discovery.text: Azure Stack brings Azure services into your own data center. Same APIs, same tools, your hardware.

twist.text: Microsoft understood that hybrid wasn't a compromise — it was what most large enterprises actually needed.

climax.text: By embracing hybrid early, Azure captured enterprises that AWS's cloud-only approach couldn't reach.

punchline.text: Azure met enterprises where they were. Not where it wished they were.

quiz.question: What does Azure Arc allow companies to do?
options: Manage on-premises and multi-cloud resources using Azure's tools
Transfer all data from other clouds into Azure automatically
Build physical Azure hardware in their own offices
